title: Lint: [A11y] NoAccessKey
description: Enforce that the `accessKey` attribute is not used on any HTML element.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoAccumulatingSpread
description: Disallow the use of spread (`...`) syntax on accumulators.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoAdjacentSpacesInRegex
description: Disallow unclear usage of consecutive space characters in regular expression literals

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoAlert
description: Disallow the use of `alert`, `confirm`, and `prompt`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoAmbiguousAnchorText
description: Disallow ambiguous anchor descriptions.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoApproximativeNumericConstant
description: Use standard constants instead of approximated literals.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoArguments
description: Disallow the use of `arguments`.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoAriaHiddenOnFocusable
description: Enforce that aria-hidden="true" is not set on focusable elements.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoAriaUnsupportedElements
description: Enforce that elements that do not support ARIA roles, states, and properties do not have those attributes.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoArrayIndexKey
description: Discourage the usage of Array index in keys.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoAssignInExpressions
description: Disallow assignments in expressions.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoAsyncPromiseExecutor
description: Disallows using an async function as a Promise executor.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoAutofocus
description: Enforce that autoFocus prop is not used on elements.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoAwaitInLoops
description: Disallow `await` inside loops.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoBannedTypes
description: Disallow primitive type aliases and misleading types.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoBarrelFile
description: Disallow the use of barrel file.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocument
description: Prevent usage of `next/script`'s `beforeInteractive` strategy outside of `pages/_document.js` in a Next.js project.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoBiomeFirstException
description: Prevents the misuse of glob patterns inside the `files.includes` field.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoBitwiseOperators
description: Disallow bitwise operators.

title: Lint: [Security] NoBlankTarget
description: Disallow `target="_blank"` attribute without `rel="noopener"`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoCatchAssign
description: Disallow reassigning exceptions in catch clauses.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoChildrenProp
description: Prevent passing of **children** as props.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoClassAssign
description: Disallow reassigning class members.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoCommaOperator
description: Disallow comma operator.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoCommentText
description: Prevent comments from being inserted as text nodes

title: Lint: [Style] NoCommonJs
description: Disallow use of CommonJs module system in favor of ESM style imports.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoCompareNegZero
description: Disallow comparing against `-0`

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoConditionalExpect
description: Disallow conditional `expect()` calls inside tests.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoConfusingLabels
description: Disallow labeled statements that are not loops.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoConfusingVoidType
description: Disallow `void` type outside of generic or return types.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoConsole
description: Disallow the use of `console`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoConstAssign
description: Prevents from having `const` variables being re-assigned.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoConstEnum
description: Disallow TypeScript `const enum`

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoConstantBinaryExpressions
description: Disallow expressions where the operation doesn't affect the value

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoConstantCondition
description: Disallow constant expressions in conditions

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoConstantMathMinMaxClamp
description: Disallow the use of `Math.min` and `Math.max` to clamp a value where the result itself is constant.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoConstructorReturn
description: Disallow returning a value from a `constructor`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoContinue
description: Disallow continue statements.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoControlCharactersInRegex
description: Prevents from having control characters and some escape sequences that match control characters in regular expression literals.

title: Lint: [Security] NoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlWithChildren
description: Report when a DOM element or a component uses both `children` and `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` prop.

title: Lint: [Security] NoDangerouslySetInnerHtml
description: Prevent the usage of dangerous JSX props

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDebugger
description: Disallow the use of `debugger`

title: Lint: [Style] NoDefaultExport
description: Disallow default exports.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoDelete
description: Disallow the use of the `delete` operator.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDeprecatedImports
description: Restrict imports of deprecated exports.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDeprecatedMediaType
description: Disallow deprecated media types.

title: Lint: [Style] NoDescendingSpecificity
description: Disallow a lower specificity selector from coming after a higher specificity selector.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoDistractingElements
description: Enforces that no distracting elements are used.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDivRegex
description: Disallow equal signs explicitly at the beginning of regular expressions.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDocumentCookie
description: Disallow direct assignments to `document.cookie`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDocumentImportInPage
description: Prevents importing `next/document` outside of `pages/_document.jsx` in Next.js projects.

title: Lint: [Style] NoDoneCallback
description: Disallow using a callback in asynchronous tests and hooks.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDoubleEquals
description: Require the use of `===` and `!==`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateArgumentNames
description: Require all argument names for fields & directives to be unique.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateAtImportRules
description: Disallow duplicate `@import` rules.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateAttributes
description: Disallow duplication of attributes.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateCase
description: Disallow duplicate case labels.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateClassMembers
description: Disallow duplicate class members.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateCustomProperties
description: Disallow duplicate custom properties within declaration blocks.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateDependencies
description: Prevent the listing of duplicate dependencies. The rule supports the following dependency groups: "bundledDependencies", "bundleDependencies", "dependencies", "devDependencies", "overrides", "optionalDependencies", and "peerDependencies".

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateElseIf
description: Disallow duplicate conditions in if-else-if chains

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateEnumValueNames
description: Require all enum value names to be unique.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateEnumValues
description: Disallow duplicate enum member values.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateFieldDefinitionNames
description: Require all fields of a type to be unique.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateFields
description: No duplicated fields in GraphQL operations.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateFontNames
description: Disallow duplicate names within font families.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateGraphqlOperationName
description: Enforce unique operation names across a GraphQL document.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateInputFieldNames
description: Require fields within an input object to be unique.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateJsxProps
description: Prevents JSX properties to be assigned multiple times.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateObjectKeys
description: Disallow two keys with the same name inside objects.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateParameters
description: Disallow duplicate function parameter name.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateProperties
description: Disallow duplicate properties within declaration blocks.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateSelectorsKeyframeBlock
description: Disallow duplicate selectors within keyframe blocks.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoDuplicateTestHooks
description: A `describe` block should not contain duplicate hooks.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicateVariableNames
description: Require all variable definitions to be unique.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoDuplicatedSpreadProps
description: Disallow JSX prop spreading the same identifier multiple times.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoDynamicNamespaceImportAccess
description: Disallow accessing namespace imports dynamically.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoEmptyBlockStatements
description: Disallow empty block statements and static blocks.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoEmptyBlock
description: Disallow CSS empty blocks.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoEmptyCharacterClassInRegex
description: Disallow empty character classes in regular expression literals.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoEmptyInterface
description: Disallow the declaration of empty interfaces.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoEmptyObjectKeys
description: Disallow empty keys in JSON objects.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoEmptyPattern
description: Disallows empty destructuring patterns.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoEmptySource
description: Disallow empty sources.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoEmptyTypeParameters
description: Disallow empty type parameters in type aliases and interfaces.

title: Lint: [Style] NoEnum
description: Disallow TypeScript enum.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoEqualsToNull
description: Require the use of `===` or `!==` for comparison with `null`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoEvolvingTypes
description: Disallow variables from evolving into `any` type through reassignments.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoExcessiveClassesPerFile
description: Enforce a maximum number of classes per file.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoExcessiveCognitiveComplexity
description: Disallow functions that exceed a given Cognitive Complexity score.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoExcessiveLinesPerFile
description: Restrict the number of lines in a file.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoExcessiveLinesPerFunction
description: Restrict the number of lines of code in a function.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoExcessiveNestedTestSuites
description: This rule enforces a maximum depth to nested `describe()` in test files.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoExplicitAny
description: Disallow the `any` type usage.

title: Lint: [Style] NoExportedImports
description: Disallow exporting an imported variable.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoExportsInTest
description: Disallow using `export` or `module.exports` in files containing tests

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoExtraBooleanCast
description: Disallow unnecessary boolean casts

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoExtraNonNullAssertion
description: Prevents the wrong usage of the non-null assertion operator (`!`) in TypeScript files.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoFallthroughSwitchClause
description: Disallow fallthrough of `switch` clauses.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoFlatMapIdentity
description: Disallow to use unnecessary callback on `flatMap`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoFloatingClasses
description: Disallow `new` operators outside of assignments or comparisons.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoFloatingPromises
description: Require Promise-like statements to be handled appropriately.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoFocusedTests
description: Disallow focused tests.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoForEach
description: Prefer `for...of` statement instead of `Array.forEach`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoForIn
description: Disallow iterating using a for-in loop.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoFunctionAssign
description: Disallow reassigning function declarations.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoGlobalAssign
description: Disallow assignments to native objects and read-only global variables.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoGlobalDirnameFilename
description: Disallow the use of `__dirname` and `__filename` in the global scope.

title: Lint: [Security] NoGlobalEval
description: Disallow the use of global `eval()`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoGlobalIsFinite
description: Use `Number.isFinite` instead of global `isFinite`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoGlobalIsNan
description: Use `Number.isNaN` instead of global `isNaN`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoGlobalObjectCalls
description: Disallow calling global object properties as functions

title: Lint: [Style] NoHeadElement
description: Prevent usage of `<head>` element in a Next.js project.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoHeadImportInDocument
description: Prevent using the `next/head` module in `pages/_document.js` on Next.js projects.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoHeaderScope
description: The scope prop should be used only on `<th>` elements.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoHexColors
description: Disallow hex colors.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoImgElement
description: Prevent usage of `` element in a Next.js project.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoImplicitAnyLet
description: Disallow use of implicit `any` type on variable declarations.

title: Lint: [Style] NoImplicitBoolean
description: Disallow implicit `true` values on JSX boolean attributes

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoImplicitCoercions
description: Disallow shorthand type conversions.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoImportAssign
description: Disallow assigning to imported bindings

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoImportCycles
description: Prevent import cycles.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoImportantInKeyframe
description: Disallow invalid `!important` within keyframe declarations

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoImportantStyles
description: Disallow the use of the `!important` style.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoIncrementDecrement
description: Disallows the usage of the unary operators ++ and --.

title: Lint: [Style] NoInferrableTypes
description: Disallow type annotations for variables, parameters, and class properties initialized with a literal expression.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInnerDeclarations
description: Disallow `function` and `var` declarations that are accessible outside their block.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoInteractiveElementToNoninteractiveRole
description: Enforce that non-interactive ARIA roles are not assigned to interactive HTML elements.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInvalidBuiltinInstantiation
description: Ensure that builtins are correctly instantiated.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInvalidConstructorSuper
description: Prevents the incorrect use of `super()` inside classes. It also checks whether a call `super()` is missing from classes that extends other constructors.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInvalidDirectionInLinearGradient
description: Disallow non-standard direction values for linear gradient functions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInvalidGridAreas
description: Disallows invalid named grid areas in CSS Grid Layouts.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInvalidPositionAtImportRule
description: Disallow the use of `@import` at-rules in invalid positions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoInvalidUseBeforeDeclaration
description: Disallow the use of variables, function parameters, classes, and enums before their declaration

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoIrregularWhitespace
description: Disallows the use of irregular whitespace characters.

title: Lint: [Style] NoJsxLiterals
description: Disallow string literals inside JSX elements.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoJsxPropsBind
description: Disallow .bind(), arrow functions, or function expressions in JSX props

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoLabelVar
description: Disallow labels that share a name with a variable

title: Lint: [A11y] NoLabelWithoutControl
description: Enforce that a label element or component has a text label and an associated input.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoLeakedRender
description: Prevent problematic leaked values from being rendered.

title: Lint: [Style] NoMagicNumbers
description: Reports usage of "magic numbers" — numbers used directly instead of being assigned to named constants.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoMisleadingCharacterClass
description: Disallow characters made with multiple code points in character class syntax.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoMisleadingInstantiator
description: Enforce proper usage of `new` and `constructor`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoMisplacedAssertion
description: Checks that the assertion function, for example `expect`, is placed inside an `it()` function call.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoMisrefactoredShorthandAssign
description: Disallow shorthand assign when variable appears on both sides.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoMissingVarFunction
description: Disallow missing var function for css variables.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoMisusedPromises
description: Disallow Promises to be used in places where they are almost certainly a mistake.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoMultiAssign
description: Disallow use of chained assignment expressions

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoMultiStr
description: Disallow creating multiline strings by escaping newlines.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoNamespaceImport
description: Disallow the use of namespace imports.

title: Lint: [Style] NoNamespace
description: Disallow the use of TypeScript's `namespace`s.

title: Lint: [Style] NoNegationElse
description: Disallow negation in the condition of an `if` statement if it has an `else` clause.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoNestedComponentDefinitions
description: Disallows defining React components inside other components.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoNestedPromises
description: Disallow nested `.then()` or `.catch()` promise calls.

title: Lint: [Style] NoNestedTernary
description: Disallow nested ternary expressions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoNextAsyncClientComponent
description: Prevent client components from being async functions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoNodejsModules
description: Forbid the use of Node.js builtin modules.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoNonNullAssertedOptionalChain
description: Disallow non-null assertions after optional chaining expressions.

title: Lint: [Style] NoNonNullAssertion
description: Disallow non-null assertions using the `!` postfix operator.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoNoninteractiveElementInteractions
description: Disallow use event handlers on non-interactive elements.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoNoninteractiveElementToInteractiveRole
description: Enforce that interactive ARIA roles are not assigned to non-interactive HTML elements.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoNoninteractiveTabindex
description: Enforce that `tabIndex` is not assigned to non-interactive HTML elements.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoNonoctalDecimalEscape
description: Disallow `\8` and `\9` escape sequences in string literals.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoOctalEscape
description: Disallow octal escape sequences in string literals

title: Lint: [Style] NoParameterAssign
description: Disallow reassigning `function` parameters.

title: Lint: [Style] NoParameterProperties
description: Disallow the use of parameter properties in class constructors.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoParametersOnlyUsedInRecursion
description: Disallow function parameters that are only used in recursive calls.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightElementHandle
description: Disallow usage of element handles (`page.$()` and `page.$$()`).

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightEval
description: Disallow usage of `page.$eval()` and `page.$$eval()`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightForceOption
description: Disallow usage of the `{ force: true }` option.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightMissingAwait
description: Enforce Playwright async APIs to be awaited or returned.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightNetworkidle
description: Disallow usage of the `networkidle` option.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightPagePause
description: Disallow using `page.pause()`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightUselessAwait
description: Disallow unnecessary `await` for Playwright methods that don't return promises.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightWaitForNavigation
description: Disallow using `page.waitForNavigation()`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightWaitForSelector
description: Disallow using `page.waitForSelector()`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoPlaywrightWaitForTimeout
description: Disallow using `page.waitForTimeout()`.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoPositiveTabindex
description: Prevent the usage of positive integers on `tabIndex` property

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoPrecisionLoss
description: Disallow literal numbers that lose precision

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoPrivateImports
description: Restrict imports of private exports.

title: Lint: [Style] NoProcessEnv
description: Disallow the use of `process.env`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoProcessGlobal
description: Disallow the use of `process` global.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoProto
description: Disallow the use of the deprecated `__proto__` object property.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoPrototypeBuiltins
description: Disallow direct use of `Object.prototype` builtins.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoQuickfixBiome
description: Disallow the use if `quickfix.biome` inside editor settings file.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoQwikUseVisibleTask
description: Disallow `useVisibleTask$()` functions in Qwik components.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoReExportAll
description: Avoid re-export all.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoReactForwardRef
description: Replaces usages of `forwardRef` with passing `ref` as a prop.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoReactPropAssignments
description: Disallow assigning to React component props.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoReactSpecificProps
description: Prevents React-specific JSX properties from being used.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoRedeclare
description: Disallow variable, function, class, and type redeclarations in the same scope.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoRedundantAlt
description: Enforce `img` alt prop does not contain the word "image", "picture", or "photo".

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoRedundantDefaultExport
description: Checks if a default export exports the same symbol as a named export.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoRedundantRoles
description: Enforce explicit `role` property is not the same as implicit/default role property on an element.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoRedundantUseStrict
description: Prevents from having redundant `"use strict"`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoRenderReturnValue
description: Prevent the usage of the return value of `React.render`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoRestrictedElements
description: Disallow the use of configured elements.

title: Lint: [Style] NoRestrictedGlobals
description: This rule allows you to specify global variable names that you don’t want to use in your application.

title: Lint: [Style] NoRestrictedImports
description: Disallow specified modules when loaded by import or require.

title: Lint: [Style] NoRestrictedTypes
description: Disallow user defined types.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoReturnAssign
description: Disallow assignments in return statements.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoRootType
description: Disallow the usage of specified root types

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoScriptUrl
description: Disallow `javascript:` URLs in HTML.

title: Lint: [Security] NoSecrets
description: Disallow usage of sensitive data such as API keys and tokens.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoSelfAssign
description: Disallow assignments where both sides are exactly the same.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoSelfCompare
description: Disallow comparisons where both sides are exactly the same.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoSetterReturn
description: Disallow returning a value from a setter

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoShadowRestrictedNames
description: Disallow identifiers from shadowing restricted names.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoShadow
description: Disallow variable declarations from shadowing variables declared in the outer scope.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoShorthandPropertyOverrides
description: Disallow shorthand properties that override related longhand properties.

title: Lint: [Style] NoShoutyConstants
description: Disallow the use of constants which its value is the upper-case version of its name.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoSkippedTests
description: Disallow disabled tests.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoSolidDestructuredProps
description: Disallow destructuring props inside JSX components in Solid projects.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoSparseArray
description: Prevents the use of sparse arrays (arrays with holes).

title: Lint: [A11y] NoStaticElementInteractions
description: Enforce that static, visible elements (such as `<div>`) that have click handlers use the valid role attribute.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoStaticOnlyClass
description: This rule reports when a class has no non-static members, such as for a class used exclusively as a static namespace.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoStringCaseMismatch
description: Disallow comparison of expressions modifying the string case with non-compliant value.

title: Lint: [Style] NoSubstr
description: Enforce the use of `String.slice()` over `String.substr()` and `String.substring()`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoSuspiciousSemicolonInJsx
description: It detects possible "wrong" semicolons inside JSX elements.

title: Lint: [A11y] NoSvgWithoutTitle
description: Enforces the usage of the `title` element for the `svg` element.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoSwitchDeclarations
description: Disallow lexical declarations in `switch` clauses.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoSyncScripts
description: Prevent the usage of synchronous scripts.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoTemplateCurlyInString
description: Disallow template literal placeholder syntax in regular strings.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoTernary
description: Disallow ternary operators.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoThenProperty
description: Disallow `then` property.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoThisInStatic
description: Disallow `this` and `super` in `static` contexts.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoTopLevelLiterals
description: Require the JSON top-level value to be an array or object.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoTsIgnore
description: Prevents the use of the TypeScript directive `@ts-ignore`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUnassignedVariables
description: Disallow `let` or `var` variables that are read but never assigned.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUndeclaredDependencies
description: Disallow the use of dependencies that aren't specified in the `package.json`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoUndeclaredEnvVars
description: Disallow the use of undeclared environment variables.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUndeclaredVariables
description: Prevents the usage of variables that haven't been declared inside the document.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUnknownAtRules
description: Disallow unknown at-rules.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoUnknownAttribute
description: Disallow unknown DOM properties.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownFunction
description: Disallow unknown CSS value functions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownMediaFeatureName
description: Disallow unknown media feature names.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownProperty
description: Disallow unknown properties.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownPseudoClass
description: Disallow unknown pseudo-class selectors.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownPseudoElement
description: Disallow unknown pseudo-element selectors.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownTypeSelector
description: Disallow unknown type selectors.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnknownUnit
description: Disallow unknown CSS units.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnmatchableAnbSelector
description: Disallow unmatchable An+B selectors.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoUnnecessaryConditions
description: Disallow unnecessary type-based conditions that can be statically determined as redundant.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnreachableSuper
description: Ensures the `super()` constructor is called exactly once on every code  path in a class constructor before `this` is accessed if the class has a superclass

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnreachable
description: Disallow unreachable code

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnresolvedImports
description: Warn when importing non-existing exports.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUnsafeDeclarationMerging
description: Disallow unsafe declaration merging between interfaces and classes.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnsafeFinally
description: Disallow control flow statements in finally blocks.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUnsafeNegation
description: Disallow using unsafe negation.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnsafeOptionalChaining
description: Disallow the use of optional chaining in contexts where the undefined value is not allowed.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUnusedExpressions
description: Disallow expression statements that are neither a function call nor an assignment.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnusedFunctionParameters
description: Disallow unused function parameters.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnusedImports
description: Disallow unused imports.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnusedLabels
description: Disallow unused labels.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnusedPrivateClassMembers
description: Disallow unused private class members

title: Lint: [Style] NoUnusedTemplateLiteral
description: Disallow template literals if interpolation and special-character handling are not needed

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoUnusedVariables
description: Disallow unused variables.

title: Lint: [Performance] NoUnwantedPolyfillio
description: Prevent duplicate polyfills from Polyfill.io.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessCatchBinding
description: Disallow unused catch bindings.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessCatch
description: Disallow unnecessary `catch` clauses.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessConstructor
description: Disallow unnecessary constructors.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessContinue
description: Avoid using unnecessary `continue`.

title: Lint: [Style] NoUselessElse
description: Disallow `else` block when the `if` block breaks early.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessEmptyExport
description: Disallow empty exports that don't change anything in a module file.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessEscapeInRegex
description: Disallow unnecessary escape sequence in regular expression literals.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUselessEscapeInString
description: Disallow unnecessary escapes in string literals.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessFragments
description: Disallow unnecessary fragments

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessLabel
description: Disallow unnecessary labels.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessLoneBlockStatements
description: Disallow unnecessary nested block statements.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoUselessRegexBackrefs
description: Disallow useless backreferences in regular expression literals that always match an empty string.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessRename
description: Disallow renaming import, export, and destructured assignments to the same name.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoUselessReturn
description: Disallow redundant return statements.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessStringConcat
description: Disallow unnecessary concatenation of string or template literals.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessStringRaw
description: Disallow unnecessary `String.raw` function in template string literals without any escape sequence.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessSwitchCase
description: Disallow useless `case` in `switch` statements.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessTernary
description: Disallow ternary operators when simpler alternatives exist.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessThisAlias
description: Disallow useless `this` aliasing.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessTypeConstraint
description: Disallow using `any` or `unknown` as type constraint.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessUndefinedInitialization
description: Disallow initializing variables to `undefined`.

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoUselessUndefined
description: Disallow the use of useless `undefined`.

title: Lint: [Style] NoValueAtRule
description: Disallow use of `@value` rule in CSS modules.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoVar
description: Disallow the use of `var`

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVoidElementsWithChildren
description: This rules prevents void elements (AKA self-closing elements) from having children.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVoidTypeReturn
description: Disallow returning a value from a function with the return type 'void'

title: Lint: [Complexity] NoVoid
description: Disallow the use of `void` operators, which is not a familiar operator.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoVueArrowFuncInWatch
description: Disallows using arrow functions when defining a watcher.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVueDataObjectDeclaration
description: Enforce that Vue component `data` options are declared as functions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVueDuplicateKeys
description: Disallow duplicate keys in Vue component data, methods, computed properties, and other options.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoVueOptionsApi
description: Disallow the use of Vue Options API.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoVueRefAsOperand
description: Disallow the use of value wrapped by `ref()`(Composition API) as operand

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVueReservedKeys
description: Disallow reserved keys in Vue component data and computed properties.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVueReservedProps
description: Disallow reserved names to be used as props.

title: Lint: [Correctness] NoVueSetupPropsReactivityLoss
description: Disallow destructuring of `props` passed to `setup` in Vue projects.

title: Lint: [Nursery] NoVueVIfWithVFor
description: Disallow using `v-if` and `v-for` directives on the same element.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] NoWith
description: Disallow `with` statements in non-strict contexts.

title: Lint: [Style] NoYodaExpression
description: Disallow the use of yoda expressions.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseAdjacentOverloadSignatures
description: Disallow the use of overload signatures that are not next to each other.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseAltText
description: Enforce that all elements that require alternative text have meaningful information to relay back to the end user.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseAnchorContent
description: Enforce that anchors have content and that the content is accessible to screen readers.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseAriaActivedescendantWithTabindex
description: Enforce that `tabIndex` is assigned to non-interactive HTML elements with `aria-activedescendant`.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseAriaPropsForRole
description: Enforce that elements with ARIA roles must have all required ARIA attributes for that role.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseAriaPropsSupportedByRole
description: Enforce that ARIA properties are valid for the roles that are supported by the element.

title: Lint: [Style] UseArrayLiterals
description: Disallow Array constructors.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseArraySome
description: Prefer `Array.prototype.some()` over verbose existence checks.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseArraySortCompare
description: Require Array#sort and Array#toSorted calls to always provide a compareFunction.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseArrowFunction
description: Use arrow functions over function expressions.

title: Lint: [Style] UseAsConstAssertion
description: Enforce the use of `as const` over literal type and type annotation.

title: Lint: [Style] UseAtIndex
description: Use `at()` instead of integer index access.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseAwaitThenable
description: Enforce that `await` is _only_ used on `Promise` values.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseAwait
description: Ensure `async` functions utilize `await`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseBaseline
description: Disallow CSS properties, values, at-rules, functions, and selectors that are not part of the configured Baseline.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseBiomeIgnoreFolder
description: Promotes the correct usage for ignoring folders in the configuration file.

title: Lint: [Style] UseBlockStatements
description: Requires following curly brace conventions.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseButtonType
description: Enforces the usage of the attribute `type` for the element `button`

title: Lint: [Style] UseCollapsedElseIf
description: Enforce using `else if` instead of nested `if` in `else` clauses.

title: Lint: [Style] UseCollapsedIf
description: Enforce using single `if` instead of nested `if` clauses.

title: Lint: [Style] UseComponentExportOnlyModules
description: Enforce declaring components only within modules that export React Components exclusively.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentArrayType
description: Require consistently using either `T[]` or `Array<T>`

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentArrowReturn
description: Enforce consistent arrow function bodies.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentBuiltinInstantiation
description: Enforce the use of `new` for all builtins, except `String`, `Number` and `Boolean`.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentCurlyBraces
description: This rule enforces consistent use of curly braces inside JSX attributes and JSX children.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseConsistentEnumValueType
description: Disallow enums from having both number and string members.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseConsistentGraphqlDescriptions
description: Require all descriptions to follow the same style (either block or inline) to  maintain consistency and improve readability across the schema.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentMemberAccessibility
description: Require consistent accessibility modifiers on class properties and methods.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseConsistentMethodSignatures
description: Enforce consistent use of either method signatures or function properties within interfaces and type aliases.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentObjectDefinitions
description: Require the consistent declaration of object literals. Defaults to explicit definitions.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConsistentTypeDefinitions
description: Enforce type definitions to consistently use either `interface` or `type`.

title: Lint: [Style] UseConst
description: Require `const` declarations for variables that are only assigned once.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseDateNow
description: Use `Date.now()` to get the number of milliseconds since the Unix Epoch.

title: Lint: [Style] UseDefaultParameterLast
description: Enforce default function parameters and optional function parameters to be last.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseDefaultSwitchClauseLast
description: Enforce default clauses in switch statements to be last

title: Lint: [Style] UseDefaultSwitchClause
description: Require the default clause in switch statements.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseDeprecatedDate
description: Require the `@deprecated` directive to specify a deletion date.

title: Lint: [Style] UseDeprecatedReason
description: Require specifying the reason argument when using `@deprecated` directive

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseDestructuring
description: Require destructuring from arrays and/or objects

title: Lint: [Style] UseEnumInitializers
description: Require that each enum member value be explicitly initialized.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseErrorCause
description: Enforce that `new Error()` is thrown with the original error as `cause`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseErrorMessage
description: Enforce passing a message value when creating a built-in error.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseExhaustiveDependencies
description: Enforce correct dependency usage within React hooks.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseExhaustiveSwitchCases
description: Require switch-case statements to be exhaustive.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseExpect
description: Ensure that test functions contain at least one `expect()` or similar assertion.

title: Lint: [Style] UseExplicitLengthCheck
description: Enforce explicitly comparing the `length`, `size`, `byteLength` or `byteOffset` property of a value.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseExplicitType
description: Enforce types in functions, methods, variables, and parameters.

title: Lint: [Style] UseExponentiationOperator
description: Disallow the use of `Math.pow` in favor of the `**` operator.

title: Lint: [Style] UseExportType
description: Promotes the use of `export type` for types.

title: Lint: [Style] UseExportsLast
description: Require that all exports are declared after all non-export statements.

title: Lint: [Style] UseFilenamingConvention
description: Enforce naming conventions for JavaScript and TypeScript filenames.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseFind
description: Enforce the use of Array.prototype.find() over Array.prototype.filter() followed by [0] when looking for a single result.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseFlatMap
description: Promotes the use of `.flatMap()` when `map().flat()` are used together.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseFocusableInteractive
description: Elements with an interactive role and interaction handlers must be focusable.

title: Lint: [Style] UseForOf
description: Prefer using `for...of` loops over standard `for` loops where possible.

title: Lint: [Style] UseFragmentSyntax
description: This rule enforces the use of `<>...</>` over `<Fragment>...</Fragment>`.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseGenericFontNames
description: Disallow a missing generic family keyword within font families.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseGetterReturn
description: Enforce `get` methods to always return a value.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseGlobalThis
description: Enforce the use of `globalThis` over `window`, `self`, and `global`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseGoogleFontDisplay
description: Enforces the use of a recommended `display` strategy with Google Fonts.

title: Lint: [Performance] UseGoogleFontPreconnect
description: Ensure the `preconnect` attribute is used when using Google Fonts.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseGraphqlNamedOperations
description: Enforce specifying the name of GraphQL operations.

title: Lint: [Style] UseGraphqlNamingConvention
description: Validates that all enum values are capitalized.

title: Lint: [Style] UseGroupedAccessorPairs
description: Enforce that getters and setters for the same property are adjacent in class and object definitions.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseGuardForIn
description: Require `for-in` loops to include an `if` statement.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseHeadingContent
description: Enforce that heading elements (h1, h2, etc.) have content and that the content is accessible to screen readers. Accessible means that it is not hidden using the aria-hidden prop.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseHookAtTopLevel
description: Enforce that all React hooks are being called from the Top Level component functions.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseHtmlLang
description: Enforce that `html` element has `lang` attribute.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseIframeTitle
description: Enforces the usage of the attribute `title` for the element `iframe`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseImageSize
description: Enforces that `` elements have both width and height attributes.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseImportExtensions
description: Enforce file extensions for relative imports.

title: Lint: [Style] UseImportType
description: Promotes the use of `import type` for types.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseImportsFirst
description: Enforce that all imports appear at the top of the module.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseIndexOf
description: Prefer `Array#{indexOf,lastIndexOf}()` over `Array#{findIndex,findLastIndex}()` when looking for the index of an item.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseInlineScriptId
description: Enforce `id` attribute on `next/script` components with inline content or `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseInputName
description: Require mutation argument to be always called "input"

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseIsArray
description: Use `Array.isArray()` instead of `instanceof Array`.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseIsNan
description: Require calls to `isNaN()` when checking for `NaN`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseIterableCallbackReturn
description: Enforce consistent return values in iterable callbacks.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseJsonImportAttributes
description: Enforces the use of `with { type: "json" }` for JSON module imports.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseJsxKeyInIterable
description: Disallow missing key props in iterators/collection literals.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseKeyWithClickEvents
description: Enforce onClick is accompanied by at least one of the following: `onKeyUp`, `onKeyDown`, `onKeyPress`.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseKeyWithMouseEvents
description: Enforce `onMouseOver` / `onMouseOut` are accompanied by `onFocus` / `onBlur`.

title: Lint: [Style] UseLiteralEnumMembers
description: Require all enum members to be literal values.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseLiteralKeys
description: Enforce the usage of a literal access to properties over computed property access.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseLoneAnonymousOperation
description: Disallow anonymous operations when more than one operation specified in document.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseLoneExecutableDefinition
description: Require queries, mutations, subscriptions or fragments each to be located in separate files.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseMaxParams
description: Enforce a maximum number of parameters in function definitions.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseMediaCaption
description: Enforces that `audio` and `video` elements must have a `track` for captions.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseNamedCaptureGroup
description: Enforce using named capture groups in regular expression.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseNamespaceKeyword
description: Require using the `namespace` keyword over the `module` keyword to declare TypeScript namespaces.

title: Lint: [Style] UseNamingConvention
description: Enforce naming conventions for everything across a codebase.

title: Lint: [Style] UseNodeAssertStrict
description: Promotes the usage of `node:assert/strict` over `node:assert`.

title: Lint: [Style] UseNodejsImportProtocol
description: Enforces using the `node:` protocol for Node.js builtin modules.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseNullishCoalescing
description: Enforce using the nullish coalescing operator (`??`) instead of logical or (`||`).

title: Lint: [Style] UseNumberNamespace
description: Use the `Number` properties instead of global ones.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseNumberToFixedDigitsArgument
description: Enforce using the digits argument with `Number#toFixed()`.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseNumericLiterals
description: Disallow `parseInt()` and `Number.parseInt()` in favor of binary, octal, and hexadecimal literals

title: Lint: [Style] UseNumericSeparators
description: Enforce the use of numeric separators in numeric literals.

title: Lint: [Style] UseObjectSpread
description: Prefer object spread over `Object.assign()` when constructing new objects.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseOptionalChain
description: Enforce using concise optional chain instead of chained logical expressions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseParseIntRadix
description: Enforce the consistent use of the radix argument when using `parseInt()`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UsePlaywrightValidDescribeCallback
description: Enforce valid `describe()` callback.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseQwikClasslist
description: Prefer using the `class` prop as a classlist over the `classnames` helper.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseQwikMethodUsage
description: Disallow `use*` hooks outside of `component$` or other `use*` hooks in Qwik applications.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseQwikValidLexicalScope
description: Disallow unserializable expressions in Qwik dollar ($) scopes.

title: Lint: [Style] UseReactFunctionComponents
description: Enforce that components are defined as functions and never as classes.

title: Lint: [Style] UseReadonlyClassProperties
description: Enforce marking members as `readonly` if they are never modified outside the constructor.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseRegexLiterals
description: Enforce the use of the regular expression literals instead of the RegExp constructor if possible.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseRegexpExec
description: Enforce `RegExp#exec` over `String#match` if no global flag is provided.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseRequiredScripts
description: Enforce the presence of required scripts in package.json.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseScopedStyles
description: Enforce that `<style>` blocks in Vue SFCs have the `scoped` attribute and that `<style>` blocks in Astro components do not have the `is:global` directive.

title: Lint: [Style] UseSelfClosingElements
description: Prevent extra closing tags for components without children.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseSemanticElements
description: It detects the use of `role` attributes in JSX elements and suggests using semantic elements instead.

title: Lint: [Style] UseShorthandAssign
description: Require assignment operator shorthand where possible.

title: Lint: [Style] UseShorthandFunctionType
description: Enforce using function types instead of object type with call signatures.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseSimpleNumberKeys
description: Disallow number literal object member names which are not base 10 or use underscore as separator.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseSimplifiedLogicExpression
description: Discard redundant terms from logical expressions.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseSingleJsDocAsterisk
description: Enforce JSDoc comment lines to start with a single asterisk, except for the first one.

title: Lint: [Style] UseSingleVarDeclarator
description: Disallow multiple variable declarations in the same variable statement

title: Lint: [Performance] UseSolidForComponent
description: Enforce using Solid's `<For />` component for mapping an array to JSX elements.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseSortedClasses
description: Enforce the sorting of CSS utility classes.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseSpread
description: Enforce the use of the spread operator over `.apply()`.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseStaticResponseMethods
description: Use static `Response` methods instead of `new Response()` constructor when possible.

title: Lint: [Suspicious] UseStrictMode
description: Enforce the use of the directive `"use strict"` in script files.

title: Lint: [Style] UseSymbolDescription
description: Require a description parameter for the `Symbol()`.

title: Lint: [Style] UseTemplate
description: Prefer template literals over string concatenation.

title: Lint: [Style] UseThrowNewError
description: Require `new` when throwing an error.

title: Lint: [Style] UseThrowOnlyError
description: Disallow throwing non-`Error` values.

title: Lint: [Performance] UseTopLevelRegex
description: Require regex literals to be declared at the top level.

title: Lint: [Style] UseTrimStartEnd
description: Enforce the use of `String.trimStart()` and `String.trimEnd()` over `String.trimLeft()` and `String.trimRight()`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseUnicodeRegex
description: Enforce the use of the `u` or `v` flag for regular expressions.

title: Lint: [Style] UseUnifiedTypeSignatures
description: Disallow overload signatures that can be unified into a single signature.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseUniqueElementIds
description: Prevent the usage of static string literal `id` attribute on elements.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseValidAnchor
description: Enforce that all anchors are valid, and they are navigable elements.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseValidAriaProps
description: Ensures that ARIA properties `aria-*` are all valid.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseValidAriaRole
description: Elements with ARIA roles must use a valid, non-abstract ARIA role.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseValidAriaValues
description: Enforce that ARIA state and property values are valid.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseValidAutocomplete
description: Use valid values for the `autocomplete` attribute on `input` elements.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseValidForDirection
description: Enforce "for" loop update clause moving the counter in the right direction.

title: Lint: [A11y] UseValidLang
description: Ensure that the attribute passed to the `lang` attribute is a correct ISO language and/or country.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseValidTypeof
description: This rule checks that the result of a `typeof` expression is compared to a valid value.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueConsistentDefinePropsDeclaration
description: Enforce consistent `defineProps` declaration style.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueConsistentVBindStyle
description: Enforce a consistent style for `v-bind` in Vue templates.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueConsistentVOnStyle
description: Enforce a consistent style for `v-on` in Vue templates.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueDefineMacrosOrder
description: Enforce specific order of Vue compiler macros.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueHyphenatedAttributes
description: Enforce hyphenated (kebab-case) attribute names in Vue templates.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueMultiWordComponentNames
description: Enforce multi-word component names in Vue components.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueVForKey
description: Enforce that elements using `v-for` also specify a unique `key`.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidTemplateRoot
description: Enforce valid Vue `<template>` root usage.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVBind
description: Forbids `v-bind` directives with missing arguments or invalid modifiers.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVCloak
description: Enforce valid `v-cloak` Vue directives.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVElseIf
description: Enforce valid `v-else-if` directives.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVElse
description: Enforce valid usage of v-else.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVHtml
description: Enforce valid `v-html` directives.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVIf
description: Enforces valid `v-if` usage for Vue templates.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVOn
description: Enforce valid `v-on` directives with proper arguments, modifiers, and handlers.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVOnce
description: Enforce valid `v-once` Vue directives.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVPre
description: Enforce valid `v-pre` Vue directives.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueValidVText
description: Enforce valid `v-text` Vue directives.

title: Lint: [Nursery] UseVueVapor
description: Enforce opting in to Vue Vapor mode in `<script setup>` blocks.

title: Lint: [Complexity] UseWhile
description: Enforce the use of `while` loops instead of `for` loops when the initializer and update expressions are not needed.

title: Lint: [Correctness] UseYield
description: Require generator functions to contain `yield`.
